## Project Team

This project was built for FINTECH 533 as a research workflow for designing, backtesting, and documenting a volatility breakout trading strategy with an implied-volatility-aware machine learning overlay.

## Team
### Abhinav Sharaff

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhinav-sharaff/)

### Yiting Sun

## Project Focus

The team focused on keeping the strategy explainable: clear entry and exit rules, auditable blotter and ledger outputs, and an ML extension that adjusts breakout exposure without replacing the core trading logic.
